version_notes: Added multi-router Mikrotik support: router selection in admin pages (Mikrotik/Hotspot/Voucher/Settings), PPPoE monitoring per-router, and config validation compatible with legacy single-router settings.
changelog: - Added multi-router configuration via Admin Settings (mikrotik_routers + default router)
- Added router selector & routerId propagation on hotspot voucher page
- PPPoE monitoring and notifications now include router context
- Added Duitku gateway (create payment + webhook) with admin configuration UI
- Customer payments now follow admin active gateway and show methods for that gateway
- Customer portal login now requires phone + password (default 123456)
- Customer can change portal password from profile page
- Admin can reset customer portal password to default from customer list/detail
- Added agent system with WhatsApp integration
- Added collector profile with transaction statistics
